ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument (e.g., INTLDAX14829) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., stock, bond, index) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number for the instrument */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures number for the instrument */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List number for the instrument */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the instrument */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the financial instrument */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date for bonds and other fixed-income instruments */,
  "coupon_rate" REAL /* Coupon rate for bonds */,
  "last_trading_date" TEXT /* Last trading date for options and futures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument on the trading date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument on the trading date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument on the trading date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument on the trading date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades executed on that date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for stock splits, dividends, etc. */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend amount for the trading date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio for the trading date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for this market data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the trader */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader in the firm (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the trader */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address for the trader */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the firm */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the trader was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading account */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trader managing the account */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the trading account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction in the account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account executing the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade transaction */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the trade */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for this trade entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trading_accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader setting the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value that triggers the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is currently active */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_triggered_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was last triggered */,
  "trigger_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the alert has been triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who owns the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist item */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist containing the item */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being tracked in the watchlist */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the item was added to the watchlist */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last known price of the instrument in the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who generated the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, custom) */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_calendars" (
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calendar entry */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Specific date of trading */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the date is a holiday */,
  "market_open_time" TEXT /* Time the market opens on the trading date */,
  "market_close_time" TEXT /* Time the market closes on the trading date */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the calendar entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calendar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., API, feed) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "last_sync_date" TEXT /* Date the data source was last synchronized */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading account involved in the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES trading_accounts ("account_id")
)
